name: Role of Autophagy in Type 2 Diabetes Microvascular Dysfunction
summary: ClinicalTrials.gov recruiting 60-participant early phase 1 randomized double-masked trehalose trial in type 2 diabetes and healthy-aging context, with nitric-oxide-mediated vasodilation and autophagic-flux protein-expression endpoints and no posted results in the June 11, 2026 API view.
